name: Generate Random Float Value
short_description: Generates a pseudo-random floating-point number within a specified inclusive range, rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound (inclusive) for the random number generation.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound (inclusive) for the random number generation.

name: Transaction Fee Calculation
short_description: Calculates the net amount received after applying a percentage fee to a crypto transaction.

inputs.name: transaction_value
inputs.description: The initial value of the crypto transaction.

inputs.name: fee_percent
inputs.description: The fee percentage applied to the transaction (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

name: Fixed Fee Crypto Transaction
short_description: Calculates the net amount received after a fixed fee is subtracted from a crypto transaction.

inputs.name: transaction_value
inputs.description: The initial value of the crypto transaction.

inputs.name: fixed_fee
inputs.description: The fixed fee applied to the transaction.

name: Net Amount from Bulk Transactions with Varying Fees
short_description: Calculates the total net amount received from a batch of transactions, each with a different amount and fee rate.

inputs.name: fee1
inputs.description: Fee rate (in percentage) for the first transaction

inputs.name: fee2
inputs.description: Fee rate (in percentage) for the second transaction

inputs.name: fee3
inputs.description: Fee rate (in percentage) for the third transaction

name: Cross-Chain Transfer with Fee and Bonus
short_description: Calculates the net amount received from a cross-chain transfer after deducting a percentage fee and adding a fixed bonus.

inputs.name: initial_value
inputs.description: The initial value of the cross-chain transaction.

inputs.name: fee_percent
inputs.description: The percentage fee applied to the initial value (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

inputs.name: bonus
inputs.description: The fixed bonus amount credited after the fee deduction.

name: Multi-Factor Crypto Transaction Analysis
short_description: Calculates the total net amount from a crypto transaction split between two networks, each with different fee and bonus structures.

inputs.name: transaction_value
inputs.description: The initial total value of the crypto transaction.

inputs.name: fee_percent_net1
inputs.description: The percentage fee charged by Network 1 (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

inputs.name: fixed_fee_net2
inputs.description: The fixed fee amount charged by Network 2.

inputs.name: bonus_percent_net2
inputs.description: The percentage bonus added by Network 2 (e.g., 5.0 for 5.0%).
